title: LordWisps Skyblock Mods
description: Contains most of the needed Skyblock mods for the hypixel server, such as sbo, skyhanni, frimament etc...
body: This modpack includes most of the essential mods for playing Hypixel SkyBlock, such as SkyBlock Overhaul (SBO), SkyHanni, Firmament, and many more, providing useful features, quality-of-life improvements, and helpful overlays for everyday gameplay.
